# services.v4l2-relayd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.v4l2-relayd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | v4l2-relayd instances to be created. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.cardLabel` | `string` | The name the camera will show up as. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable this v4l2-relayd instance. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Extra packages to add to {env}`GST_PLUGIN_PATH` for the instance. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.input.format` | `string` | The video-format to read from input-stream. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.input.framerate` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | The framerate to read from input-stream. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.input.height` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | The height to read from input-stream. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.input.pipeline` | `string` | The gstreamer-pipeline to use for the input-stream. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.input.width` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | The width to read from input-stream. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.name` | `string` | The name of the instance. |
| `services.v4l2-relayd.instances.<name>.output.format` | `string` | The video-format to write to output-stream. |
